1	import { Global, Module } from '@nestjs/common';
2	import { KnexModule } from 'nest-knexjs';
3	
4	import { KNEX_READ_CONNECTION, KNEX_WRITE_CONNECTION } from '@modules/db/db.constant';
5	
6	import { getEnv } from '@utils/get-env-variable.util';
7	
8	import {
9		DATABASE_URL,
10		DATABASE_URL_READ_REPLICA,
11	} from '@constants/env-variables.constant';
12	
13	@Global()
14	@Module({
15		imports: [
16			KnexModule.forRoot(
17				{
18					name: KNEX_WRITE_CONNECTION,
19					config: {
20						client: 'pg',
21						connection: {
22							connectionString: getEnv<string>({ key: DATABASE_URL, converter: String }),
23						},
24						pool: {
25							min: 2,
26							max: 10,
27							acquireTimeoutMillis: 10_000,
28							idleTimeoutMillis: 30_000,
29						},
30					},
31				},
32				KNEX_WRITE_CONNECTION,
33			),
34			KnexModule.forRoot(
35				{
36					name: KNEX_READ_CONNECTION,
37					config: {
38						client: 'pg',
39						connection: {
40							connectionString: getEnv<string>({
41								key: DATABASE_URL_READ_REPLICA,
42								converter: String,
43							}),
44						},
45						pool: {
46							min: 2,
47							max: 10,
48							acquireTimeoutMillis: 10_000,
49							idleTimeoutMillis: 30_000,
50						},
51					},
52				},
53				KNEX_READ_CONNECTION,
54			),
55		],
56		exports: [KnexModule],
57	})
58	export class DbModule {}
59
